title: Nuke Plugin
description: A project based on cubicmetre's orbital strike cannon
body:
# Offers:
A unique variaty of commands
Customization
Cool features

# Downsides:
Laggy

# Project Creator Note:
This is mostly a passion project but as the days go by and the more and the more people downloading it. This project might make a new future for me. I hope to to devolpe plugins for high end server, im already making one for my freind. Getting updates is kinda hard because i only started learning java for ths project. So i very much appricate your patience for any updates.

Join the discord: [Discord](https://discord.gg/XwJZ4kYRF8)

print("Have a nice day")
